jobs.purpose: Produce a scoped settings snapshot as JSON (or YAML). Uploaded to storage module + returned via signed URL. Useful for tenant admin config backups + support incident reproduction.
steps: Query SettingValue rows for the target scope.
Apply masking: sensitive fields render as `***` unless --reveal super_admin.
Serialise to JSON with schema version header.

jobs.purpose: Replay a settings snapshot into a target scope. Validates against current schema; refuses partial imports.
steps: Verify schema version. Fail if incompatible.
For each (group, name, payload): call SettingsWriter::write() individually so SettingsChangeEvent fires + audit trail captures.

jobs.purpose: Handle registry schema drift. When a module ships a new SettingField or renames one, this job walks affected SettingValue rows + applies the migration (default fill, rename, remove).
jobs.notes: Dispatched by post-deploy hook when the compiled registry differs from the previous deploy's snapshot.
